title: AppDetails
description: Represents a single application with a larger set of attributes than provided in the AppSummary, including Instances, Activity, Contract, Fiscal Spend, Compliance, and SSO Protocols.

ApplicationId.description: The unique identifier of the application.

AppStatus.description: The current status of the application.

Activity.description: Usage activity metrics for the application.

Contracts.description: Contract details associated with the application.

FiscalSpend.description: Fiscal spend data for the application.

SSOProtocols.description: SSO protocols supported by the application.
